sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21857" key="geneiasth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γενει-αστήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n21857.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">chin-strap</tr_> of a bridle, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:147" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.147</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
